source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed.) — McChesney, Covey, Huling, Thele, Walker
_comment: Trigger requires WIG + lead measures already defined; the skill turns existing tracking pain into a glance-readable players' scoreboard. Lures probe org-wide BI, generic habit-trackers, pre-D2 (no leads yet), and bullet journals.

test_cases.prompt: I have a WIG and two lead measures, but the Notion dashboard I built for it is too complex and I never look at my tracker anymore.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-personal-scoreboard; diagnose coach's-as-players' substitution and run the Socratic redesign (passive surface, ≤4 elements, where-you-should-be line, 5-second test).
test_cases.notes: positive: classic 'hidden / over-complex tracker' symptom with D1+D2 already in place

test_cases.prompt: WIGとリード指標は決めたんだけど、ダッシュボードが複雑すぎて見ない。どうしたらいい?
test_cases.expected_behavior: 4dx-d3-personal-scoreboardを起動し、プレイヤー用スコアボードを再設計する(受動的な表示面・4要素以下・あるべき位置線・5秒テスト)。
test_cases.notes: positive JP: matches the 'ダッシュボードが複雑すぎて見ない' language signal explicitly

test_cases.prompt: 我 WIG 跟領先指標都定好了,但我的追蹤工具沒在更新,Excel 開了就忘了關。怎麼讓進度看得見?
test_cases.expected_behavior: 啟動 4dx-d3-personal-scoreboard;判定為 hidden scoreboard + 教練式被當成球員式,用蘇格拉底式對話重新設計可一眼讀懂的球員計分板。
test_cases.notes: positive zh-TW: '追蹤工具沒在更新' + '進度看得見' double signal

test_cases.prompt: We need to design our company-wide BI dashboard for the executive team to monitor 30 KPIs across 5 departments.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; this is org-wide BI / coach's-scoreboard territory explicitly excluded by the boundary section.
test_cases.notes: lure: org-scale dashboard, wrong tool — the skill's B section excludes this

test_cases.prompt: Build me a habit-tracker in Notion for my morning routine — meditation, journaling, exercise.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; this is a habit-frequency tracker (Atomic Habits style), not a 4DX WIG scoreboard with lead+lag+pacing line. No WIG mentioned.
test_cases.notes: lure: surface-similar (tracker / Notion) but wrong methodology — habits, not WIG-tracking

test_cases.prompt: I have a WIG defined — what's the next step in 4DX?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill; redirect to 4dx-d2-personal-lead-measure-discovery. D3 requires lead measures to already exist; the next step from D1 is D2, not D3.
test_cases.notes: lure: pre-D2 — looks 4DX-adjacent but skill's E step 1 halt condition explicitly redirects

test_cases.prompt: How do I keep a bullet journal? I want to organize my tasks and reflections.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate; bullet journal is a periodic-review / coach's-view artifact, not a glance-during-work scoreboard, and there is no WIG framing.
test_cases.notes: lure: generic productivity framework — explicitly called out in 'easily-confused neighboring methodologies'

test_cases.prompt: I've got my WIG (run a sub-50-min 10K by Sept) and lead measures (3 runs/week, 1 long run). Should I track this in Excel or on a sticky note?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-personal-scoreboard; apply players'-vs-coach distinction and the 5-second / passive-surface rule — push toward the sticky note (or other passive visual surface in their daily field of view) over Excel, with a where-you-should-be line.
test_cases.notes: boundary: visualization-medium choice ambiguity — skill should fire AND deliver the medium-selection rule, not abstain

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
